title: polygala subtilis
intro: Polygala subtilis, also known as Polygala tenuifolia or Yuan Zhi, is a plant native to China and used in traditional medicine. It is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Polygala subtilis include improved cognitive function, reduced anxiety and stress, and enhanced sleep quality. Polygala subtilis can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, making it a popular supplement in traditional Chinese medicine.
